The **Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party** is the provincial committee of the [Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party "Chinese Communist Party") (CCP) in [Anhui](/wiki/Anhui "Anhui"), [China](/wiki/China "China"), and the province's top authority. The [CCP committee secretary](/wiki/Party_Secretary_of_Anhui "Party Secretary of Anhui") is the highest-ranking post in the province.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

In February 1949, prior to the [Yangtze River Crossing campaign](/wiki/Yangtze_River_Crossing_campaign "Yangtze River Crossing campaign"), the [Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Central_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party"), acknowledging that [southern Anhui](/wiki/Southern_Anhui "Southern Anhui") remained "unliberated," resolved against establishing the CCP Anhui Provincial Party Committee, delineating the [Yangtze River](/wiki/Yangtze "Yangtze") as the boundary.[[1]](#cite_note-v237-1) Instead, it formed separate Party Committees for northern and southern Anhui, each with distinct leadership for party, government, and military operations. [Zeng Xisheng](/wiki/Zeng_Xisheng "Zeng Xisheng") served as the secretary of the Anhui North District Party Committee and the commander of the military region.[[2]](#cite_note-b377-2)

The Party Committee of Northern Anhui District was subordinate to the Municipal CCP Committees of [Hefei](/wiki/Hefei "Hefei"), [Bengbu](/wiki/Bengbu "Bengbu"), and [Anqing](/wiki/Anqing "Anqing"), as well as to the six district committees of Suxian, [Fuyang](/wiki/Fuyang "Fuyang"), [Chuxian](/wiki/Chuxian_County "Chuxian County"), [Lu'an](/wiki/Lu%27an "Lu'an"), [Chaohu](/wiki/Chaohu "Chaohu"), and [Anqing](/wiki/Anqing "Anqing"), along with the Huainan Mining District Committee. [Xie Fuzhi](/wiki/Xie_Fuzhi "Xie Fuzhi") held the position of secretary of the South Anhui District Committee, which operated under the [Wuhu](/wiki/Wuhu "Wuhu") Municipal Committee and the four local committees of [Wudang](/wiki/Wudang_Mountains "Wudang Mountains"), [Xuancheng](/wiki/Xuancheng "Xuancheng"), [Chizhou](/wiki/Chizhou "Chizhou"), and [Huizhou](/wiki/Huizhou,_Anhui "Huizhou, Anhui").[[3]](#cite_note-k121-3)

On January 2, 1952, the CCP Central Committee sanctioned the formation of the Anhui Provincial Committee of the CCP, overseen by the [East China Bureau of the Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party](/w/index.php?title=East_China_Bureau_of_the_Central_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&redlink=1 "East China Bureau of the Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party (page does not exist)") [[zh](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E4%B8%AD%E5%85%B1%E4%B8%AD%E5%A4%AE%E5%8D%8E%E4%B8%9C%E5%B1%80 "zh:中共中央华东局")], and dissolved the North Anhui and South Anhui District Party Committees. Zeng Xisheng was appointed secretary of the Anhui Provincial CCP Committee, and in August, the southern and northern Anhui districts were consolidated to become the new Anhui Province.[[4]](#cite_note-k088-4) The Central People's Government Committee sanctioned the formation of the Anhui Provincial People's Government Committee, appointing [Zeng Xisheng](/wiki/Zeng_Xisheng "Zeng Xisheng") as chairman.[[5]](#cite_note-z224-5)

In April 1954, following the dissolution of the East China Bureau of the CCP Central Committee, the Anhui Provincial Committee of the CCP came under the direct authority of the [Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Central_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party"). Within the jurisdiction of Hefei, Bengbu, Wuhu, and Anqing municipal party committees, together with the local party committees of Suxian, Fuyang, Chu County, Liu'an, Chaohu, Xuancheng, Chizhou, Anqing, and Huizhou, as well as the party committee of the Huainan Mining District. Provincial Party Committee offices in [Hefei City](/wiki/Hefei_City "Hefei City").[[6]](#cite_note-k795-6)[[7]](#cite_note-i349-7)

On April 1, 2016, the Anhui Provincial Committee relocated from its former address at 39 [Changjiang Middle Road](/w/index.php?title=Changjiang_Middle_Road&action=edit&redlink=1 "Changjiang Middle Road (page does not exist)") [[zh](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E9%95%BF%E6%B1%9F%E4%B8%AD%E8%B7%AF "zh:长江中路")], [Hefei City](/wiki/Hefei "Hefei"), to 1 Zhongshan Road, Baohu District, Hefei City.[[8]](#cite_note-y533-8) On May 1, 2016, the Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party and the [Anhui Provincial People's Government](/wiki/Anhui_Provincial_People%27s_Government "Anhui Provincial People's Government") formally commenced operations at 1 Zhongshan Road, Baohu District, Hefei City.[[9]](#cite_note-f964-9)[[10]](#cite_note-h282-10)

## Organizations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Organizations")]

The organization of the Anhui Provincial Committee includes:

* General Office

### Functional Departments

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Functional Departments")]

* Organization Department
* Publicity Department
* United Front Work Department
* Political and Legal Affairs Commission
* Social Work Department
* Commission for Discipline Inspection
* Supervisory Commission

### Offices

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Offices")]

* Policy Research Office
* Office of the Cyberspace Affairs Commission
* Office of the Foreign Affairs Commission
* Office of the Deepening Reform Commission
* Office of the Institutional Organization Commission
* Office of the Military-civilian Fusion Development Committee
* Taiwan Work Office
* Office of the Leading Group for Inspection Work
* Bureau of Veteran Cadres

### Dispatched institutions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Dispatched institutions")]

* Working Committee of the Organs Directly Affiliated to the Anhui Provincial Committee

### Organizations directly under the Committee

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Organizations directly under the Committee")]

* Anhui Party School
* [Anhui Daily Newspaper Group](/wiki/Anhui_Daily_Newspaper_Group "Anhui Daily Newspaper Group")
* Anhui Institute of Socialism
* Party History Research Office
* Anhui Provincial Archives
* Lecturer Group

### Organization managed by the work organization

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Organization managed by the work organization")]

* Confidential Bureau
